message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_01-40-00_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Failing test: "should transform a vertical blinker [(0,0),(0,1),(0,2)] into a horizontal blinker [(-1,1),(0,1),(1,1)]"
Expected behavior: nextGeneration([[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]]) returns [[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]]
Current error: Expected [[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]], received []
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_01-40-00_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts

Current implementation has special case for length===4 returning input. Need a more general approach now since blinker requires birth (reproduction). Implement the proper Game of Life algorithm: for each live cell and its neighbors, count live neighbors; live cells survive with 2-3 neighbors; dead cells become alive with exactly 3.

All previously passing tests must continue to pass:
1. nextGeneration([]) → []
2. nextGeneration([[0,0]]) → []
3. nextGeneration([[0,1],[1,1]]) → []
4. nextGeneration([[0,0],[1,0],[0,1],[1,1]]) → same 4 cells
5. nextGeneration([[0,0],[0,1],[0,2]]) → [[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]]

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the proper Game of Life algorithm to make the blinker test pass while keeping all other tests green.
I'll note the skills system reminder and proceed with the implementation.

content.text:
All 5 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Replaced the special-case stub with a proper Game of Life algorithm. For each live cell and its 8 neighbors, count live neighbors using a Set for O(1) lookup. Apply Conway's rules: live cells survive with 2 or 3 neighbors, dead cells become alive with exactly 3 neighbors.
- Result: All tests now pass (5 passing, 3 todo)
- Approach: This is the minimal general implementation needed because the blinker test requires birth (a dead cell coming alive), which cannot be handled by hardcoded special cases without effectively re-implementing the rules. The candidate set is restricted to live cells plus their neighbors, since only those cells can possibly be alive in the next generation.

Files relevant to the task:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_01-40-00_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts
